headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Deepens its Commitment to India With a New Launch
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the 10 Best Stocks in Chase Coleman’s Tiger Global Portfolio. On June 4, 2026, GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) announced the launch of its 3.8 MW–154m onshore wind turbine and the award of a 100 MW order from Powerica Limited, deepening its commitment to India’s renewable sector. The company […]

headline: Is Electrification Becoming GE Vernova's Most Valuable Business?
summary: GEV's Electrification segment is surging as grid expansion, AI data centers and rising power demand fuel orders, revenue and margin growth.

headline: 3 AI Bottleneck Stocks I'm Buying As Markets Sell Off
summary: AI infrastructure demand remains robust, driving hyperscalers to increase capex and fueling bottlenecks in CPUs, memory, and energy supply. Read what investors need to know.
